channel.title: IPL Dashboard on Jayasri Pudota
channel.description: Recent content in IPL Dashboard on Jayasri Pudota

item.title: IPL Dashboard
item.description: Driven by my husband's passion for cricket, I created an IPL Dashboard to showcase key tournament statistics and insights. The project features detailed visualizations of batting and bowling stats, orange and purple cap holders, and tournament 4s/6s, among other metrics. Built with a focus on user-friendly design, it allows fans to explore team and player performance interactively. I leveraged data analysis and visualization tools to transform raw cricket data into engaging insights. This personal project strengthened my skills in data processing, dashboard development, and sports analytics.
